normally would be in with a chance but bagachi didn't want their company with his new bike a new trust instilled within him away he went staying with him Tom hidcock chasing on litzenko and of course of teleport catcher well in Flanders he just powered away on the most difficult climb and it was pretty much the same on this day Healy dispatched this time as pidcock wrestled his bike trying to stay with pogacha and then Pitcock himself faded as this man powered away it was quite remarkable just over 28 kilometers to go and pagacha just preferred to be on his own Healy powered back onto the wheel of pidcock and then would try and engage the chase himself but it was Podium places up for grabs for Everyone by this man head down going for it and the last climbs were to be crested by him alone hot in Pursuit pidcock looked handy playing a good game was Ben Healy trying as best as he could to preserve what strength he had and then in the end penultimate climb off he went pidcock distance Healy charging into the Gap and in fact it closed to around 18 seconds after Coburg the crowds implanted on the test that used to define the race but this man's defining the season after six hours in the saddle two more climbs went to him and of course the Finish Line at the time telephone catcher on fire Ben Healy I mean that at all super result after runner up in the bravage peel now runner up here pitcock just held on as latenko had nothing left in the tank to challenge KRON at the line and that's how it finished pogacho with a 38 second margin in the end over Irishman Ben Healy and Tom pidcock krondenko badgiori van Hills but this bad he came here and he just once again imposed himself like nobody else can what does it hold for the rest of the islands Classics well be very afraid cheers to that foreign and that must strike fear into just about everybody great race great day and a great champion of the amson gold race
